title: Telepathology-only lab — cross-region, NOT MODELED
description: India-based telepathology practice serving rural US clinics via digital signout. Zero on-site clinical presence, no glass slide movement, consult revenue is the ENTIRE business (not a side pillar). Reimbursement regime is US CPT codes at India cost base — cross-region arbitrage not captured in any region profile. Expected outcome: calculator runs but staffing model and reimbursement regime don't match the India standalone profile at all.

expected.notes: EXPECTED OUTCOME: Many pillars zero out because the fixture nulls the physical inputs. What remains (commercial_growth, consult_revenue_scale, subspecialty_routing) is real but uses India cost basis. The finding is that there is no cross-region reimbursement mode — the lab earns US dollars on US CPT codes but spends India rupees on operations. Outcome: feature request for a 'revenue_region' vs 'cost_region' split, or a dedicated 'telepathology_service' profile.
